# Discover Kutaisi

Local travel site for Kutaisi and Western Georgia covering private tours, transfers, places to visit, travel planning, and local tips.

Base URL: https://discoverkutaisi.com

## Core Pages
- Home: https://discoverkutaisi.com/
- Tours: https://discoverkutaisi.com/tours
- Transfers: https://discoverkutaisi.com/transfers
- Places to Visit: https://discoverkutaisi.com/places-to-visit
- Blog: https://discoverkutaisi.com/blog
- Reviews: https://discoverkutaisi.com/reviews
- About: https://discoverkutaisi.com/about
- Contact: https://discoverkutaisi.com/contact

## Featured Tours
- Gelati - Motsameta - Bagrati: https://discoverkutaisi.com/tours/gelati-motsameta-bagrati
- Martvili - Prometheus: https://discoverkutaisi.com/tours/martvili-prometheus
- Martvili - Okatse - Prometheus: https://discoverkutaisi.com/tours/martvili-okatse-prometheus
- Tskhrajvari - Shaori - Nikortsminda: https://discoverkutaisi.com/tours/tskhrajvari-shaori-nikortsminda
- Okatse - Kinchkha: https://discoverkutaisi.com/tours/okatse-kinchkha

## Places
- Gelati Monastery: https://discoverkutaisi.com/places-to-visit/gelati-monastery
- Bagrati Cathedral: https://discoverkutaisi.com/places-to-visit/bagrati-cathedral
- Prometheus Cave: https://discoverkutaisi.com/places-to-visit/prometheus-cave
- Martvili Canyon: https://discoverkutaisi.com/places-to-visit/martvili-canyon
- Okatse Canyon: https://discoverkutaisi.com/places-to-visit/okatse-canyon
- Sataplia Strict Nature Reserve: https://discoverkutaisi.com/places-to-visit/sataplia-strict-nature-reserve
- Kinchkha Waterfall: https://discoverkutaisi.com/places-to-visit/kinchkha-waterfall
- Motsameta Monastery: https://discoverkutaisi.com/places-to-visit/motsameta-monastery
- Nikortsminda Temple: https://discoverkutaisi.com/places-to-visit/nikortsminda-temple
- Shaori Reservoir: https://discoverkutaisi.com/places-to-visit/shaori-reservoir
- Tskhrajvari Shrine: https://discoverkutaisi.com/places-to-visit/tskhrajvari-shrine

- Perfect Weekend in Kutaisi: https://discoverkutaisi.com/blog/weekend-guide-kutaisi

- Kutaisi Airport Transfer Tips: https://discoverkutaisi.com/blog/kutaisi-airport-transfer-tips

## Transfer Routes
- Kutaisi to Kutaisi Airport: https://discoverkutaisi.com/transfers#kutaisi-to-kutaisi-airport
- Kutaisi to Tbilisi: https://discoverkutaisi.com/transfers#kutaisi-to-tbilisi
- Kutaisi to Batumi: https://discoverkutaisi.com/transfers#kutaisi-to-batumi
- Kutaisi to Mestia: https://discoverkutaisi.com/transfers#kutaisi-to-mestia
- Kutaisi to Telavi: https://discoverkutaisi.com/transfers#kutaisi-to-telavi
- Kutaisi to Borjomi: https://discoverkutaisi.com/transfers#kutaisi-to-borjomi
- Kutaisi to Bakuriani: https://discoverkutaisi.com/transfers#kutaisi-to-bakuriani
